findings.title: local.properties tracked in git
findings.description: local.properties committed to git despite being in .gitignore. Exposes developer filesystem path. Now public on GitHub.
findings.exploit_scenario: Attacker clones repo, reads developer home directory path from local.properties
findings.impact: Developer path disclosure. No credentials exposed.
findings.recommendation: git rm --cached local.properties && git commit && git push

findings.title: PlaybackService accepts all media controller connections without package validation
findings.description: onConnect accepts every app. onAddMediaItems sets Uri=mediaId without scheme validation.
findings.exploit_scenario: Malicious app sends MediaItem with attacker-controlled URI; ExoPlayer streams from that URI revealing device IP
findings.impact: Unauthorized playback control, IP disclosure to attacker server
findings.recommendation: Add package allowlist in onConnect; validate http/https scheme in onAddMediaItems
